task_completion.description: Verify the Asset Tag, Name, and Model are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT 'Create Asset' form or asset details page showing Asset Tag 'ASSET-L011', Asset Name 'HP EliteBook 860 G11 - Marketing', and Model 'HP EliteBook 840 G10'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Status and Serial Number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT form or asset details page showing Status 'Ready to Deploy' and Serial Number 'HP860G11-SN-2001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Date, Purchase Cost, and Warranty are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT form or asset details page showing Purchase Date '2025-01-20', Purchase Cost '1549.99' (or '$1,549.99'), and Warranty '36' (or '36 months').

task_completion.description: Verify the Supplier, Default Location, and Note are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Snipe-IT form or asset details page showing Supplier 'CDW Corporation', Default Location 'New York Office', and Notes containing 'New laptop for marketing team expansion'.

task_completion.description: Verify the asset was successfully saved and created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green success banner (e.g., 'Asset created successfully') or the newly created asset appearing in the 'All Assets' list view or its own dedicated details page.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window navigating the Snipe-IT UI. The agent should not be using curl, python scripts, or terminal commands to interact with the API.

integrity.description: The agent must not interact directly with the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open with MySQL, SQLite, or other database clients executing INSERT statements.

integrity.description: The agent must actually fill out and submit the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of the form being filled out and the 'Save' button being clicked, rather than just inspecting the page and editing HTML to fake a success screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Asset details to verify: Asset Tag: 'ASSET-L011', Name: 'HP EliteBook 860 G11 - Marketing', Model: 'HP EliteBook 840 G10', Status: 'Ready to Deploy', Serial Number: 'HP860G11-SN-2001', Purchase Date: '2025-01-20', Purchase Cost: 1549.99, Warranty: 36 months, Supplier: 'CDW Corporation', Default Location: 'New York Office', Note: 'New laptop for marketing team expansion'.
